modern.name: Default
modern.floor: light oak hardwood with subtle grain texture
modern.furniture_style: contemporary Scandinavian — clean lines, linen and neutral upholstery
modern.accent_primary: deep burgundy/mauve (#7B3F6E) on bedding, chair cushions, table accessories
modern.accent_secondary: soft lavender (#E8D5F0) on throw pillows and framed artwork
modern.fixtures: matte black (#1A1A1A) door frames, window frames, pendant lights
modern.lighting: bright natural daylight from top-left, soft directional shadows
modern.greenery: tropical plants (monstera, fiddle-leaf fig, snake plant) at balconies and room corners

ascent.name: Ascent
ascent.walls: Light off-white or very pale lavender (#e4d4ee)
ascent.floor: Light-toned wood flooring or light carpet
ascent.furniture_style: Modern minimalist design with light neutral fabric upholstery
ascent.lighting: Abundant natural light with warm, recessed indoor lighting
ascent.greenery: Lush outdoor landscaping and subtle indoor plants

ascent_residences.name: Ascent Residences
ascent_residences.lighting: Natural daylight with warm recessed interior lighting
ascent_residences.greenery: Lush, natural landscaping and balcony plants
